name: Zucchini Al Mais (Bdgm08b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the whole zucchinis in boiling water for about 6 minutes; drain.
2. Cut each zucchini in half lengthways and scoop out some of the seeds and flesh inside, leaving a 1/4 inch thick shell.
3. Chop the scooped-out flesh and drain off any liquid.
4. Mix the chopped flesh with the corn, egg yolks, ground red pepper, three-quarters of the Parmesan cheese, and salt.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff; carefully fold into the corn mixture.
6. Place the zucchini shells in an ovenproof dish, spoon in the filling, and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
7. Cook in a 350°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until risen.
8. Serve immediately.
